mapper.sql:
u.id,
#{query.tenantId} AS tenant_id,
u.tenant_id,
u.username, u.real_name,
CASE WHEN u.user_type = 0 THEN 0 WHEN sut_current.member_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS user_type,
u.user_type,
u.user_client, u.email, u.phone, u.id_card, u.gender, u.password, u.salt, u.user_status, u.avatar, u.region_code, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.login_count, u.force_password_change, u.remark, u.create_dept, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time,
t_current.tenant_name,
t.tenant_name,
orgs.org_name, orgs.org_name AS dept_name

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_tenant sut WHERE sut.user_id = u.id AND sut.tenant_id = #{query.tenantId} AND sut.status = 1 )
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

AND u.id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_org WHERE
tenant_id = #{query.tenantId} AND
org_id IN ( SELECT id FROM sys_org WHERE
tenant_id = #{query.tenantId} AND
(id = #{query.orgId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{query.orgId}, ancestors) > 0) ) )

if.test: query.regionCode != null and query.regionCode != '' and query.regionCode.contains('ALL')

sql.if: AND (u.region_code = REPLACE(#{query.regionCode},'ALL','') OR u.region_code IN (SELECT code FROM sys_region_code WHERE parent_code = REPLACE(#{query.regionCode},'ALL','')))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_tenant t ON t.id = u.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN sys_tenant t_current ON t_current.id = #{query.tenantId} LEFT JOIN sys_user_tenant sut_current ON sut_current.user_id = u.id AND sut_current.tenant_id = #{query.tenantId} AND sut_current.status = 1
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT uo.user_id, GROUP_CONCAT(o.org_name ORDER BY o.sort SEPARATOR ',') AS org_name FROM sys_user_org uo LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON o.id = uo.org_id
uo.tenant_id = #{query.tenantId}
GROUP BY uo.user_id ) orgs ON orgs.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
